info.title: Kismet REST API
info.description: REST-like API for Kismet wireless network detector, sniffer, wardriving tool, and WIDS (Wireless Intrusion Detection System). Provides endpoints for device tracking, data source management, GPS, alerts, packet capture, channels, system status, and session management. Supports both HTTP Basic auth and API key/token authentication. Returns data in JSON (via .json endpoints) or Msgpack formats.

get.description: Checks if the current session is valid. Returns success if session is active.
Validates HTTP Basic authentication credentials.

get.summary: Check if initial setup is complete
get.description: Returns whether the initial admin setup has been completed.
Returns comprehensive system status including memory usage, device count, uptime, and server info.
Returns the current server timestamp.
Returns the complete list of fields tracked by the system.
Returns status information about the current user session.
Returns summary information about all tracked devices.
Returns devices seen since the specified Unix timestamp.
Returns full details of a specific device by its Kismet device key.
Returns devices matching the specified MAC address.

post.summary: Get devices by multiple MAC addresses
post.description: Returns devices matching any of the provided MAC addresses.
Returns devices matching the provided filter expressions and field selections.

fields.description: List of field paths to include

post.description: Sets a user-friendly name for a device.

post.summary: Set a tag on a device
post.description: Sets a user tag on a device for marking/categorization.

get.description: Returns information about all configured data sources (capture interfaces).
Returns default settings for new data sources.
Lists all capture-capable interfaces on the system.
Returns details of a specific data source.

post.description: Adds a new capture data source to Kismet.
Locks a data source to a specific channel.
Configures channel hopping for a data source.
Closes and removes a data source from Kismet.
Opens or reopens a previously closed data source.

get.description: Returns the current GPS location data.
Returns all configured GPS data sources.

post.description: Submits GPS coordinates from a web client.

get.description: Returns all alerts that have been raised.
Returns alerts raised since the specified Unix timestamp.
Returns all defined alert types.
Returns channel usage and activity information across all data sources.
Returns a live stream of all captured packets in pcapng format.

get.summary: Stream packets from a specific data source
get.description: Returns a live stream of packets from a specific data source.
Returns information about the KismetDB log file.
Returns system log messages since the specified timestamp.
Returns all known physical layer (PHY) types.

Device.description: Full device details with all tracked fields

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication using the Kismet admin credentials.

apiKey.name: KISMET
apiKey.description: API key/token for session authentication. Can also be sent as a cookie.
